headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' data: blob: https:; font-src * data: blob: https: 'unsafe-inline'; style-src * 'unsafe-inline' data: https:; script-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https:; img-src * data: blob: https:; connect-src * https:; frame-src * https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
